mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_code, p.main_image, p.category_id, c.category_name, c.category_path, p.product_type, p.unit, p.standard_price, p.cost_price, p.owner_id, u.realname AS owner_name, p.status, p.description, p.create_user_id, cu.realname AS create_user_name, p.update_user_id, p.create_time, p.update_time FROM crm_product p LEFT JOIN crm_product_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id AND c.del_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN manager_user u ON p.owner_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN manager_user cu ON p.create_user_id = cu.user_id WHERE ORDER BY p.update_time DESC NULLS LAST, p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_code, p.main_image, p.category_id, c.category_name, c.category_path, p.product_type, p.unit, p.standard_price, p.cost_price, p.owner_id, u.realname AS owner_name, p.status, p.description, p.create_user_id, cu.realname AS create_user_name, p.update_user_id, p.create_time, p.update_time FROM crm_product p LEFT JOIN crm_product_category c ON p.category_id = c.category_id AND c.del_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN manager_user u ON p.owner_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN manager_user cu ON p.create_user_id = cu.user_id WHERE p.product_id = #{productId} AND p.del_flag = 0
